project_type: AWS CDK Go infrastructure-as-code project for an event-driven sleep audio pipeline
build_system: go build + cdk synth (CDK CLI via Node.js)
test_framework: Go testing package with CDK assertions (github.com/aws/aws-cdk-go/awscdk/v2/assertions)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'go test -v ./...' - all tests must pass. 2. Run 'cdk synth' - must synthesize without errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-go-kiro. 2. go mod download. 3. npm install -g aws-cdk (if not already installed). 4. go test -v ./... 5. cdk synth
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can download Go modules. Go 1.25.1 and Node.js 22 are pre-installed. CDK CLI may need npm install -g aws-cdk.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests FIRST, then minimal implementation. Conventional commits. ARCHITECTURE.md must be updated with any infra changes. Run 'go test ./...' and 'cdk synth' before pushing.
key_patterns: Single-file CDK stack (cdk-base.go) with NewCdkBaseStack function. Tests in cdk-base_test.go using assertions.Template_FromStack. Tests use HasResourceProperties, ResourceCountIs, Match_ArrayWith, Match_ObjectLike, Match_StringLikeRegexp. Each test creates its own app/stack/template. L2 constructs preferred. jsii.String() for string pointers. awsstepfunctions.JsonPath_StringAt for Step Functions paths.
directory_structure: Flat Go module at root. cdk-base.go has main stack + main(). cdk-base_test.go has all CDK assertion tests. ARCHITECTURE.md has design docs with Mermaid diagrams. .github/workflows/ci.yml for CI.
